_about: acidcat provenance signature database. Data, not code: edit this file to add or fix a writer signature without touching Python. A user override at ~/.acidcat/provenance_signatures.json is merged on top (its entries win / extend these). Regex backslashes are doubled per JSON; 'version_group' 1 captures the version into the \1 slot of 'template'.

chunk_signatures.note: Pro Tools region/element bookkeeping chunks (before/after data).
Digidesign proprietary chunks. census: DGDA 14609, DIGI 1953 files.
Logic-specific chunks; ResU is a ZIP+JSON of tempo/timesig. corpus: ResU is Logic (288/303), not Steinberg. census: LGWV 36602, ResU 16027, LGBM 3191.
dp* family; 100% co-occur, 0 FP in 2345 files. census corpus-confirmed 31/31/29/2.
the only handle on a string-stripped Bitwig render. census 1976 files (web research could not corroborate; corpus did).
census 18873 files (web research could not corroborate externally; corpus strongly confirms).
ACID stretch-marker chunks. census: strc 25288, str2 6054 files.
Serum wavetable metadata chunk ('clm '); payload is '<!>2048 ... wavetab'. corpus-confirmed: 43/43 clm files are wavetables, 0 carry an acid chunk -- NOT Sonic Foundry despite old web lore.
Roland-specific chunk. census 12 files; rare but a unique 4CC.
CineForm 'Creator' metadata, written by GoPro Studio and Adobe CineForm-codec tools. census 32 files; specific but shared across those two lineages.
generic UMID; corroborates a broadcast workflow, not a single app.

not_signatures.AFAn: shared macOS CoreAudio (Logic AND Digital Performer AND generic Mac renders) -- too ambiguous to attribute to one app; corroborate only.
not_signatures.AFmd: shared macOS CoreAudio metadata -- same as AFAn.
not_signatures.FLLR: padding shared between Pro Tools and Apple ExtAudioFile/CoreAudio -- not exclusive; corroborate only.
not_signatures._PMX: Adobe XMP metadata packet, written by many Adobe tools and others (census 28214 files) -- indicates 'has XMP', not a specific writer; corroborate only.
not_signatures.JUNK: generic padding/reserved. NOTE: a 28-byte JUNK immediately after fmt IS an ffmpeg RF64_AUTO tell -- handled positionally in provenance._ffmpeg_rf64_junk, not as a bare id match.
not_signatures.levl: EBU Peak Envelope chunk (Tech 3285 Supp 3), written by ffmpeg and many EBU-lineage tools -- too shared to attribute alone. Disambiguator: ffmpeg writes levl, Apple/CoreAudio writes PEAK.
not_signatures.PEAK: Apple/CoreAudio + libsndfile peak-envelope chunk (vs EBU levl) -- shared, corroborate-only.
